channel.title: GNfood
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNfood, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Weekly Meal Plan #86
item.description: The latest weekly meal plan offers a selection of straightforward dinner ideas designed to simplify weeknight cooking.

item.title: Baked Sweet Hawaiian Chicken
item.description: A baked chicken recipe with double the sauce, updated by reader request.

item.title: No-Bake Strawberry Cream Pie
item.description: A no-bake strawberry cream pie perfect for hot days when you want to avoid using the oven.

item.title: Mexican Macaroni Salad
item.description: A creamy, tangy Mexican-inspired macaroni salad with crisp vegetables and bold flavor.

item.title: Skirt Steak Marinade
item.description: A skirt steak marinade that boosts flavor and confidence in the kitchen.
